environment._NOTE_2_PROVIDERS: Supports: Voyage (1024 dims), OpenAI (1536/3072 dims), HF Local (768 dims, no API needed)
environment._NOTE_4_CLOUD_PROVIDERS: VOYAGE_API_KEY and OPENAI_API_KEY must come from the parent shell/launcher environment; Voyage uses rerank-2.5 and auto-selects the matching DB profile when active
environment._NOTE_5_GET_VOYAGE_KEY: Get Voyage key: https://dash.voyageai.com/api-keys (recommended, 8% better than OpenAI)
environment._NOTE_7_FEATURE_FLAGS: Opt-out flags (all default ON): SPECKIT_ADAPTIVE_FUSION, SPECKIT_EXTENDED_TELEMETRY, SPECKIT_SESSION_BOOST, SPECKIT_CAUSAL_BOOST

environment._NOTE_2: Default embedding: all-MiniLM-L6-v2 (local, no API key needed)
environment._NOTE_3: If you switch to LiteLLM with VOYAGE_API_KEY, use voyage/voyage-code-3 for code embeddings
